raw_source.title: [Taipei] Term Structure Labs hiring Frontend Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About Term Structure Labs
Term Structure Labs is pioneering the future of decentralized finance with cutting-edge products. Our new product, TermMax, is a rapidly growing fixed-rate lending and borrowing protocol currently topping the 1-month growth rankings on DefiLlama. Our team brings together exceptional engineers, successful hackathon participants, and experts in finance and trading, creating an ideal environment to build world-class products and grow professionally.

## About the Role
We are seeking a talented and motivated Frontend Engineer to join our team and help build cutting-edge decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. In this role, you will develop and maintain DeFi product interfaces with marketing features, ensuring optimal performance and seamless user experiences in the Web3 ecosystem.

## Key Responsibilities
- Develop and maintain DeFi product interfaces and marketing websites using modern frontend technologies
- Debug existing applications and implement performance optimizations to ensure fast, responsive user experiences
- Implement wallet connection features and EVM-compatible on-chain transaction capabilities
- Collaborate closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver cohesive user experiences
- Apply best practices for web security, especially in the context of blockchain applications
- Monitor site performance and make necessary adjustments for optimization

## Requirements
- Strong experience with Next.js, React.js, TypeScript, and state management solutions
- Proficiency in working with databases including MongoDB and PostgreSQL
- Experience with containerization technologies like Docker
- Demonstrated ability to leverage AI tools to accelerate development processes (testing, coding, documentation, wireframing)
- Open-minded approach to utilizing AI for code generation and collaborating effectively with team members on AI-generated code
- Eagerness to learn new technologies and adapt to different workflows for improved productivity
- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities
- Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
- Market-centered mindset with focus on solving problems and improving products quickly and efficiently
- Strong ownership spirit and ability to take initiative on projects

## Bonus Qualifications
- Previous experience with Web3 technologies, DeFi protocols, or blockchain applications
- Familiarity with smart contract integration and blockchain development patterns
- Experience with Web3 libraries (ethers.js, web3.js)
- Understanding of DeFi concepts (liquidity pools, yield farming, staking, etc.)
- Participation in blockchain/Web3 hackathons, with demonstrated ability to rapidly prototype and deliver innovative solutions

## Salary
24000-70000 USD/year

## Job Nature
- Full-time
- In-office with partial remote

## Work Location
Taipei

## Contact
Email: hr@ts.finance

Website:
https://ts.finance/

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
